name: example-deck-open-slide-canvas
title: Open-Slide 1920 Canvas Deck
description: Locked 1920x1080 canvas deck with React component-level free composition, not bound to a fixed template.

query.en: Use the Open-Slide 1920 Canvas Deck template to turn my content into a locked 1920x1080 free-composition deck with React component-level layout. Preserve the template's visual signature, use real content and data, and avoid lorem ipsum or placeholder images.
query.zh-CN: 用「1920 画布自由 Deck」模板把我的内容做成一套「锁死 1920×1080 画布, React 组件级自由组合, 不绑模板」。保持模板的视觉签名，使用真实内容和数据，避免 lorem ipsum 和占位图片。

description_i18n.en: Locked 1920x1080 canvas deck with React component-level free composition, not bound to a fixed template.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 锁死 1920×1080 画布, React 组件级自由组合, 不绑模板
